pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires exporting the file to this path and the verifier checks for it.
Task description explicitly states rename the new track to Transect_Soil_Samples.
Task description explicitly states exactly 101 points (Index 250 to 350 inclusive).
The dataset is Fells Loop, corresponding to fells_loop.gpx in the environment, and is hardcoded in the verifier as the ground truth.

Contradicted by data reality: The fells_loop.gpx file does not contain any track points (<trkpt>) and possesses a maximum of 132 total data points (waypoints + route points). This makes selecting index 250 impossible in BaseCamp.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real GPS data from ExpertGPS/TopoGrafix (fells_loop.gpx) corresponding to the Middlesex Fells Reservation. While the task description correctly requires an output path of C:\workspace\output\transect_extracted.gpx and a track name of Transect_Soil_Samples, there is a fundamental contradiction in the dataset: the original fells_loop.gpx file does not contain any track points (<trkpt>) and possesses a maximum of 132 data points (86 waypoints and 46 route points combined). This makes the tasks requirement to select track points from index 250 to 350 physically impossible. The verifier inadvertently skips the geolocation check because of this missing track data.
